the init should fork into the background; if its already running it should just exit(0)

Implemented daemonize() in daemon.rs that forks the process, with the parent exiting 0 and the child detaching via setsid, redirecting stdio, acquiring the lock, and running the daemon loop; updated main.rs and added libc dependency.
Fixed a UTF-8 boundary panic in chunker.rs and confirmed the daemon forks correctly, with logs at .proactive-context/daemon.log.
add a "stop" and a "ps" so I can see all the proacitve-context daemons that are running in any location
Added stop and ps commands, with ps scanning for all daemon PIDs across projects. Centralized project data under ~/.proactive-context/projects/ instead of per-directory .proactive-context/ folders.
I tested it out with a completely irrelevant query and it retrieved a bunch of stuff -- why?

Root cause was sqlite-vec using L2 distance instead of cosine, and no relevance threshold. Fixed by switching to explicit cosine distance, adding schema versioning, implementing a distance threshold filter (max_distance 0.75), and displaying similarity as percentage; also reset embed_provider back to local.
what llm does generate use in my config rn?
generate uses anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6, and your embed_provider is still set to openrouter which isn't implemented yet.
